creator: merlyn500@gmail.com
text:
Hello, I tried to burn 6.3 CD disc 2, but burncd (and cdrecord too)
crashes every time, on the same place (9%). Md5 sum is ok (i have tried
to download CDs again, but the same problem). Disc 1 has burned succesfully.
Is it possible, i have bad cd serie? K3b wrote me this:


System
-----------------------
K3b Version: 1.0.4

KDE Version: 3.5.8
QT Version:  3.3.8
Kernel:      6.3-STABLE
Devices
-----------------------
QSI DVD+-RW SDW-082 LX32 (/dev/cd0, ) [CD-R, CD-RW, CD-ROM, DVD-ROM, DVD-R, DVD-RW, DVD+R, DVD+RW, DVD+R DL] [DVD-ROM, DVD-R sekvenční, DVD-RW omezené přepisování, DVD-RW sekvenční, DVD+RW, DVD+R, DVD+R dvojvrstvé, CD-ROM, CD-R, CD-RW] [SAO, TAO, RAW, SAO/R96R, RAW/R16, RAW/R96R, Omezené přepisování]
